title: images: adjust output of tags and digests
body: Output (possibly multiple) tags and digests in the JSON images list, and provide all of an image's digests when listing then in non-JSON format.   Don't mistake image names which end in "@sha256:hex..." for images whose tagged names include a repository name that ends with "@sha256".

comments.body: LGTM, @mtrmac do you want to do another pass through?
At least https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1972#discussion_r344750193 is still mostly outstanding.
@nalind Are you still working on this?
@rhatdan yes, but I probably won't get back to it this week.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 2a82d07) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@nalind Do you want someone else like @TomSweeneyRedHat to take this over?
Is there work in containers/common that aims to replace this logic?
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.

@nalind: PR needs rebase.

Can we freeze this PR until the image-lib consolidation is done?  This would cause quite some merge conflicts.  Good news is that I already started migrating Buildah over, so I hope to be finished with Buildah by the end of the week.  The new library provides all core features that Buildah and Podman need but I am certain that matching all corner cases will consume time.
I've added a WIP label so it won't merge wthout thinking.

> I've added a WIP label so it won't merge wthout thinking.

Thank you! Just yesterday I moved `buildah images` over to the new library :)
